news.t: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
Real Estate ETFs Bounce From Key Support

holdings.infoBox: URE is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Real Estate (URE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Real Estate Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a market cap-weighted index of large US real estate companies, including REITs. URE was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares and ProFunds, premier providers of leveraged and inverse funds, announced plans to change the underlying indices for a combined 53 sector ETFs and mutual fu...

data.title: Real Estate ETFs Bounce From Key Support
data.text: Real estate sits among the market's top-performing sectors in 2019. Join the momentum by trading a pullback in these real estate ETFs.
